cases.title: Bell Finvest India Ltd v. Vivriti Capital Limited | Madras High Court
cases.content: On the appellants' statutory bar argument relying on Section 34 of the SARFAESI Act, the Court analysed the statutory text: Section 34 removes civil court jurisdiction to entertain suits challenging actions a secured creditor may take under the Act, but it does not bar general suits for recovery. Section 37 was read as clarifying that the SARFAESI Act is in addition to and not in derogation of other laws, leaving other modes of recovery available to secured creditors.
